training_curves.description: Training and validation metrics across optimization steps
training_curves.caption: Validation improves rapidly during the early phase and then stabilizes as the best configuration separates from the baseline.

comparison_summary.description: Grouped comparison across methods, datasets, or ablations
comparison_summary.caption: The strongest configuration improves the primary metric while preserving a consistent ordering across categories.

ablation_grid.caption: The multi-panel view separates regime-specific behavior and highlights where each variant improves or degrades relative to the baseline.
